blockers: WSL PATH does not provide node/npm, so local npm ci and local npm run build could not be executed directly.
Bundled Windows node can run TypeScript but local Vite build fails on missing Windows Rollup optional native package because node_modules belongs to the WSL/Linux install.
package.json has no lint or test scripts; lint/tests are therefore not configured for this repository snapshot.
Backend /api/v2/kornix/current-context is reachable but returns SESSION_REQUIRED without an authenticated server-side session.
